purpose: Evidence contract for advisory compliance and expert findings.

evidence_types.lineage_record: Lineage or provenance record from data-layer or product-layer.
evidence_types.environmental_declaration: EPD, footprint, materials, circularity, or recycling evidence.
evidence_types.emc_test_report: EMC, electrical conformity, or pre-compliance test report.
evidence_types.secure_update_process: Secure update and vulnerability handling process evidence.
evidence_types.radio_test_report: Wireless module, radio, Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, or NFC qualification evidence.
evidence_types.privacy_assessment: Privacy, telemetry, data minimization, retention, deletion, or access logging evidence.
evidence_types.cad_reference: CAD, housing, assembly, durability, or mechanical evidence.
evidence_types.service_instruction: Service, maintenance, repair, or installation instruction evidence.
evidence_types.spare_parts_list: Spare parts list or availability evidence.
evidence_types.sales_claim_evidence: Evidence supporting market, sales, or regional product claims.
